UpdateSourceArgs: -c "source \"{{$FullRootDir}}venv/bin/activate\" && python3 -u -m pip install -U pip setuptools matrix-synapse[postgres]"

-c "cd synapse && if [[ ! -f homeserver.yaml ]]; then source \"{{$FullRootDir}}venv/bin/activate\" && python3 -u -m synapse.app.homeserver --server-name {{server-name}} --config-path homeserver.yaml --generate-config --report-stats={{report-stats}}; fi"
